title: Competency in support, education, and care coordination
body: This program develops competency in consultation support, patient education, documentation, and care coordination within a doctor-led service model.

title: No independent diagnostic authority is granted
body: Completion of this pathway does not grant independent diagnostic authority. Learners are trained to triage, document, educate, and escalate appropriately rather than diagnose.

title: Program does not replace regulated surgical training
body: The consultant academy does not replace regulated surgical training, procedural credentialing, or medical licensure. It is designed for safer patient-facing support roles.

title: Red flags and escalation are mandatory safety duties
body: Where red flags, unusual findings, or risk indicators are present, the correct action is escalation to the responsible doctor or regulated clinician according to clinic protocol.
